bead.title: registry: three-layer plugin lookup precedence (project → global → baked-in)
bead.description:
PROBLEM (Principle 2 of epic ddx-602ae31a)

Runtime plugin/persona resolution must consult three layers in priority order so that a project-local install always wins, a machine-wide global install is used when no project copy exists, and the baked-in default ddx plugin is the last resort. Without a single authoritative resolver, the new --global install surface (sibling beads) has nothing to resolve against and project vs global precedence is undefined.

ROOT CAUSE
- cli/internal/registry/resolve.go:29 `ResolvePlugin` is the resolution entry point; cli/internal/registry/resolve.go:15 `GlobalPluginDir` derives the global tier path from ddxroot.GlobalDir(). These must implement and be test-pinned to the precedence order: <project>/.ddx/plugins/<name> (or ddxroot.Path()/plugins/<name> in convention mode) → ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name> → baked-in (defaultplugin.FS(), valid only for name=="ddx"). The precedence ordering is currently unverified by test, so a regression that flips global ahead of project would go undetected.

PROPOSED FIX
1. Ensure ResolvePlugin stats the project path first (via the projectRoot arg, which routes through ddxroot.Path() for in-tree vs convention), returning layer=="project" when present.
2. Fall back to ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name>, returning layer=="global".
3. Fall back to baked-in, returning layer=="baked-in" with empty path, only for the "ddx" plugin; otherwise return a not-found error.
4. Add focused table tests for the precedence and fallback behavior.

NON-SCOPE
- The `ddx install`/`ddx update` --global CLI surface (sibling bead: install/update --global).
- `ddx init` lazy-resolution and umbrella setup (sibling bead: init --global).
- `ddx doctor` two-layer reporting and spec/docs updates (sibling bead: doctor + docs).
- Migrating ~/.config/ddx/ legacy paths if any exist (likely none today).
- Agent-harness path discovery beyond Claude Code and Codex.

DEPS
ddx-06cbaa90 (ddx home resolution) — project-tier resolution routes through ddxroot.Path() and the global tier through ddxroot.GlobalDir(); both must be agreed-on before this lands.
bead.acceptance:
1. TestPluginLookup_PrefersProjectOverGlobal asserts that when both the project path and ${XDG_DATA_HOME}/ddx/global/plugins/<name> contain the plugin, ResolvePlugin returns the project path with layer=="project".
2. TestPluginLookup_FallsBackToGlobal asserts that when the project copy is absent but the global copy exists, ResolvePlugin returns the global path with layer=="global".
3. cd cli && go test ./internal/registry/... green.
4. lefthook run pre-commit passes.
